title: langflow-ai/langflow
summary: Langflow 是一个强大的工具，用于构建和部署 AI 驱动的代理和工作流。它支持代理、ChatGPT、生成式 AI、大型语言模型和多代理系统，并基于 React Flow 构建，提供可视化界面。
summary_en: Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows. It supports agents, ChatGPT, generative AI, large language models, and multi-agent systems, built on React Flow with a visual interface.
